zh.Eastwell, Kent, England: 英國肯特易亞斯特維爾
zh.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulse是Sir Thomas Hulse的兒子，於1500年出生在英國英格蘭爾馬布里。他於1544年與Margery Corbett在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1580年在英國爾馬布里享年80歲。

zh-hans.Eastwell, Kent, England: 英国肯特易亞斯特維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulse是Sir Thomas Hulse的儿子，于1500年出生在英国英格兰爾馬布里。他于1544年与Margery Corbett在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1580年在英国爾馬布里享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hulse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): habitational name from Hulse in Witton (Cheshire), from Middle English holes, plural of hole ‘hole, hollow, depression’ (Old English holh). See Hole .
North German (Hülse): topographic name for someone who lived where holly grew, Middle Low German huls, hüls.
American shortened and altered form of Flemish Holsaert (see Hulsart ). Compare Hulce , Huls , and Hults 1.

variants.name: Hulsart
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Holsaert: unexplained. See also Hulse 3.

variants.name: Hole
meanings: English (southwestern): topographic name for someone who lived in or by a hole or hollow, from Middle English hol(e) (Old English hol, holh, dative hole), or a habitational name from some minor place so named.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads, so named from the dative singular or indefinite plural form of Old Norse hóll ‘round hill, mound’.

In some cases possibly also an American shortened form of Flemish Van Hole: habitational name from the common placename Hol(e), meaning ‘hollow, valley’; or a topographic name from the same term or from Middle Dutch hole, heule ‘(low) arched bridge, weir’.

variants.name: Hults
meanings: Altered form of   Hulse  , a surname of Flemish (and also of English and German) origin. Compare   Hultz   1.
In some cases also a variant of   Hultz   2, a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Hulce
meanings: Altered form of   Hulse  , a surname of Flemish (and also of English and German) origin.

nameMeanings.name: Phillip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulse was born in 1500, in Marbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Thomas Hulse. He married Margery Corbett in 1544, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1580, in Marbury, Cheshire, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulse est né en 1500, à Marbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir Thomas Hulse. Il a épousé Margery Corbett en 1544, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1580, à Marbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulse wurde 1500 in Marbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Sir Thomas Hulse geboren. Er hat 1544 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Margery Corbett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1580 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Marbury, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulse è nato il nel 1500 nel Marbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Sir Thomas Hulse. Lui sposato Margery Corbett nel 1544, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1580, nel Marbury, Cheshire, England, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.Marbury, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアマルブリー
ja.Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケント
ja.Eastwell, Kent, England: イギリスケントエアストウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulseは1500年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマルブリーでSir Thomas Hulseの息子として生まれた。1544年にイギリスイギリスケントでMargery Corbettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1580年にイギリスチェシュアイアマルブリーで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulse(은)는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마버이에서 Sir Thomas Hulse의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1544년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Margery Corbett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1580년 영국 체실르 마버이에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulse nasceu em 1500, em Marbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Sir Thomas Hulse. Ele casou-se com Margery Corbett em 1544, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1580, em Marbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulse родился в 1500 г. в местности марбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Sir Thomas Hulse. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Corbett в 1544 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1580 г. в местности марбури, чешир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Phillip Hulse nació en 1500, en Marbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Sir Thomas Hulse. Se casó con Margery Corbett en 1544, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1580, en Marbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años.
